Question: By what percentage does the ebullitive methane flux at the Blanket bog core plot – Westmorland 07 change relative to the early-stage paludification value (i.e., (early − heterogeneous)/early × 100) when comparing (a) early-stage paludification with moss colonisation, temperature-driven hydrogenotrophic methanogenesis, Molinia caerulea humid grassland with sedge interpatches, versus (b) heterogeneous paludification mosaic across microtopography, acetoclastic-dominant under low redox microsites, Carex rostrata sedge-lawn dominated fen tapestry?
SQL Query: SELECT ((SELECT EbullitiveMethaneFlux FROM PeatlandEbullitionRegistry WHERE PlotReference = "Blanket bog core plot – Westmorland 07" AND PaludificationClass = "early-stage paludification with moss colonisation" AND MethanogenesisDominantPathway = "temperature-driven shift to hydrogenotrophic regime" AND ArealVegetationPantheon = "Molinia caerulea humid grassland with sedge interpatches") - (SELECT EbullitiveMethaneFlux FROM PeatlandEbullitionRegistry WHERE PlotReference = "Blanket bog core plot – Westmorland 07" AND PaludificationClass = "heterogeneous paludification mosaic across microtopography" AND MethanogenesisDominantPathway = "acetoclastic-dominant under low redox microsites" AND ArealVegetationPantheon = "Carex rostrata sedge-lawndominated fen tapestry")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT EbullitiveMethaneFlux FROM PeatlandEbullitionRegistry WHERE PlotReference = "Blanket bog core plot – Westmorland 07" AND PaludificationClass = "early-stage paludification with moss colonisation" AND MethanogenesisDominantPathway = "temperature-driven shift to hydrogenotrophic regime" AND ArealVegetationPantheon = "Molinia caerulea humid grassland with sedge interpatches"), 0) AS EbullitiveMethaneFlux;
